composer.draft: Ship the launch note update once QA confirms the final checklist.

conversations.title: Claude launch checklist
conversations.summary: Finalize launch artifacts and review assistant output.

messages.content: Summarize the remaining launch blockers for the Claude desktop release.
Three blockers remain: verification of the macOS updater, final legal review for the release note, and confirmation that support macros are updated.

artifacts.title: Launch checklist
artifacts.content:
# Launch checklist
- Verify updater health
- Confirm release notes
- Sync support macros
- Publish status page update

conversations.title: Usage review for workspace admins
conversations.summary: Assess model mix and monthly spend variance.

messages.content: Draft a short note explaining why Sonnet usage increased this week.
Usage rose after support enabled a heavier triage workflow and engineering replayed production incidents in staging.

conversations.title: Prompt regression triage
conversations.summary: Investigate a failure in the refund agent instructions.

messages.content: Compare the current refund-agent prompt to last week's version and call out the risky change.
The new prompt removed the explicit requirement to confirm subscription status before offering a refund, which increases false-positive approvals.

artifacts.title: Prompt diff notes
artifacts.content: Removed guardrail: verify active subscription before refund. Added softer language about quick resolutions.
